rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to ports, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax for all AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Only generate AGREE clauses that directly reflect requirement semantics and are supported by visible AADL identifiers.
Ensure type consistency between AGREE expressions and AADL data types; avoid invented numeric bounds.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed in the model.
Avoid encoding event ports as numeric or Boolean values unless the model provides explicit data representations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for interface-level assumptions/guarantees; implementation annexes are for subcomponent bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not assume numeric bounds for ports unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
Do not treat AADL event ports as numeric or Boolean values without model-provided data.
irrelevant_topics: Model Analyst Agent's role in extracting AADL structure
